entries.title: Game juice & gameplay improvements pass
entries.body:
Added 7 major improvements to Party Rush:

1. **CameraShake** (Assets/Scripts/Effects/CameraShake.cs) - Perlin noise screen shake on knockback, eliminations, respawns. Trauma-based decay system.

2. **Sprint FOV effect** - Camera FOV widens from 60 to 72 when sprinting at speed, smoothly interpolated.

3. **CharacterEffects** (Assets/Scripts/Effects/CharacterEffects.cs) - Landing squash/stretch animation, dust particles on hard landing, sprint trail renderer.

4. **Double Jump + Wall Jump** - CharacterMotor now supports 1 air jump, wall sliding (reduced fall speed), wall jumping with knockback and particle effects. Bots also use these abilities.

5. **ComboSystem** (Assets/Scripts/Core/ComboSystem.cs) - Checkpoint streak bonuses (50/150/300/500 pts), speed bonuses, near-miss detection. New EventBus.OnComboScored event.

6. **Enhanced HUD** - Bottom bar with live position tracker, speed bar with color thresholds, score/streak display, combo popup notifications. Updated GameHUD.uxml and GameHUD.uss.

7. **AudioManager** (Assets/Scripts/Effects/AudioManager.cs) - Procedurally generated SFX (countdown beeps, checkpoint chimes, elimination tones, victory fanfare, combo pings) and ambient music loops. Attached via SceneBootstrapper.
